📜 House Rules & Regulations Peraturan Rumah

Ringkasan dari buku panduan rasmi dan pekeliling pengurusan. / Summary from the official handbook and management circulars.

3.0 General Rules

  • 3.01 Unlawful use, nuisance — Units are for private residential use only; no business activity is allowed.
  • 3.02 Lease of the parcel — Owners must notify Management if their unit is leased out.
  • 3.03 Lifts — Smoking in lifts is strictly prohibited. Only the service lift may be used for bulky items or moving in/out.
  • 3.04 Auctions & garage sales — Not allowed without prior written consent from Management.
  • 3.05 Explosives, petroleum & flammables — Not permitted to be kept, stored, or used in any unit.
  • 3.06 Insurance — Building insurance covers only the structure and common areas. Residents must insure their own household contents.
  • 3.07 Blocking of sink pipes — No rags, oil, grease or other substances may be placed in sinks, baths, or pipes.
  • 3.08 Decoration of exterior — No exterior decoration (including plants) without Management's prior written consent.
  • 3.09 Advertisements — No notices, posters, signboards, or visible articles on windows/exterior without consent.
  • 3.10 External aerials & alterations — No antennas, satellite dishes, or alterations to external walls.
  • 3.11 Pets — No pets allowed in any unit, common property, or the building.
  • 3.12 Electrical apparatus & machinery — No machinery/electrical apparatus may be installed without written approval (normal domestic appliances excepted).
  • 3.13 Electrical points — No extra electrical points without written approval.
  • 3.14 Obstruction — No furniture, boxes, or goods left in entrances, staircases, corridors, lifts, or fire escapes.
  • 3.15 Annoyances — No act causing nuisance, annoyance, or injury to other occupants.
  • 3.16 Obstruction to access — No vehicles parked in a way that obstructs roads or passageways.
  • 3.17 Rubbish — Nothing thrown from windows/doors. Rubbish must be secured in non-porous bags and placed in proper bins. Flammable substances must not go in trash bins.
  • 3.18 Burglar alarms — No burglar alarms or security systems without prior written approval.
  • 3.19 Floor loading — Nothing that may overload or impair floors, walls, or roof.
  • 3.20 Plants — Plants must be kept within the unit and not create nuisance to others.
  • 3.21 Common area items — No altering, shifting, or removing furniture, landscaping, or other items in common areas.
  • 3.22 Firefighting equipment — No tampering with firefighting equipment, security systems, or common facilities.
  • 3.23 Religious/political activities — Not allowed in common property.
  • 3.24 Letters/parcels — Received at the occupant's own risk.
  • 3.25 Interference with common property — No interference with air-conditioning, ventilation, lighting, or security systems.
  • 3.26 Hanging of clothes — No hanging clothes, towels, or linen outside the unit or on the building.

4.03 Swimming Pool

  • No lifeguard on duty — swim at your own risk. Open daily 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM.
  • Shower before entering. No one with open wounds/bandages/infectious diseases. No spitting, spouting, or nose-blowing in the pool.
  • Dry off before leaving the pool area; no wet swimwear beyond the pool.
  • No coaching/lessons without Management's written consent.
  • No surfboards, snorkeling/scuba gear, glass items, boats. Plastic goggles and small water toys for children are allowed.
  • No noisy, rough, or dangerous play. Strictly no diving.
  • No pets, no food, near the pool.
  • Pool equipment, filters, and life buoys are for emergencies only — do not tamper or remove.
  • Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
  • No glassware or sharp/breakable objects. Proper swimming attire required.
  • No footwear, food or drinks within 2 metres of the pool edge.
  • Leave the pool during rain/thunderstorms.
  • Filtration plant and pump rooms are strictly out of bounds.
  • No cycling, roller-skating, or skateboarding on the pool deck.
  • Guests must sign in and be accompanied by a resident.
  • Management is not liable for injury, loss, or damage from use of the pool.

4.04 Gymnasium

  • Open daily 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM, unless notified otherwise.
  • No reservations — first come, first served.
  • Appropriate attire required; rubber-soled shoes only.
  • No smoking, drinking, or eating.
  • Bring your own towel.
  • Return equipment to its original position after use.
  • Children under 12 are not allowed.
  • No radios/TVs/electronics without special permission.
  • Switch off all lights, fans, and air-conditioners when you're the last to leave.
  • Management may deny access for unacceptable behaviour, and is not liable for injury, death, or property loss/damage.

4.05 Multi-Purpose Hall

  • Reserve at the Management Office at least 1 week in advance, first come first served.
  • Usable 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM unless notified otherwise.
  • RM200 deposit payable on reservation; refunded after deduction of cleaning/damage costs. Excess damage costs are charged to the resident.
  • Cancellations must be notified at least 3 days in advance, or 50% of the deposit is forfeited.
  • Host must keep guests confined to the hall.
  • No radios/TVs/sound equipment without Management approval.
  • No activity that causes nuisance or disturbs other residents.
  • Management not liable for injury, death, or property loss/damage.

4.06 Children's Playground

  • Usable 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM daily unless notified otherwise.
  • Children under 12 must be accompanied and supervised by an adult.
  • No smoking, food, or drink at the playground.
  • All litter must go in provided bins.
  • No horseplay or throwing objects.
  • Playground equipment must not be damaged, removed, or altered.
  • No radios/TVs/electronic sound equipment.
  • Management not liable for injury, death, or property loss/damage.

4.07 Barbeque Area

  • Reserve at the Management Office at least 3 days in advance, first come first served.
  • RM50 deposit payable on reservation, to ensure the pit and stove are left clean.

4.01 Alterations / Renovations

Without the Management's prior written consent, occupants may not:

  • Start work before the Certificate of Fitness for Occupation is issued.
  • Add awnings, shades, screens, or grilles outside the unit.
  • Install security grilles in designs/colours not specified by Management.
  • Connect the unit to any adjoining unit.
  • Make internal, structural, or non-structural alterations.
  • Connect new pipes, electrical wiring, cables, or conduits without approved plans and statutory consent.
  • Make any alteration or renovation whatsoever.

If consent is granted, Management may impose conditions including:

  • A renovation deposit (refunded after satisfactory completion and removal of debris; excess damage/cleaning costs are charged to the occupant).
  • Third-party liability insurance for the renovation period.
  • Submission of plans, drawings, and related documents.
  • Work hours: Mon–Fri 10:00 AM–5:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM–1:00 PM, Sun & public holidays — not allowed.
  • No storage of building materials, debris, or rubbish in common areas.
  • Occupant bears the cost of any damage to roads, drainage, sewerage, pipes, cables, or wires caused by renovation works.

4.02 Air Conditioning Installation

  • No external/protruding A/C units without Management's prior written consent.
  • Compressors must be placed in the designated compressor room; connecting pipes painted to match the extension wall colour.
  • Units must be regularly serviced (filters, fan coils, drain pipes kept clear) to avoid noise, dripping, or blockages.
  • Service contractors must not splash/hose water onto compressors, which could drip onto units below.
  • Notify Management if a major service is required.

7.0 Car Parking Rules & Regulations

Vehicles are parked at owners' own risk.

  • 7.01 Parking lots — Park only in your allocated lot.
  • 7.02 No parking in other areas — Vehicles in no-parking zones, blocking entrances/exits, or left unattended may be towed or clamped without notice. Clamp release fees: RM50 (1st offence), RM100 (2nd), RM200 (subsequent). Motorcycles/bicycles must use designated parking only.
  • 7.03 Car wash — Not allowed in the car park.
  • 7.04 Parking lot allocation — Each unit is entitled to its allocated lot(s).
  • 7.05 Repair of vehicles — No major repairs involving oil spillage or excessive noise within the building compound.
  • 7.06 Car park access card — One access card per allocated parking bay. Lost cards must be reported in writing; replacement fee RM50 per card. Vehicles without an access card will not be allowed to enter.

6.0 Fire & Emergency Evacuation Procedures

In the event of a fire:

  • Don't panic — stay calm.
  • Break the fire alarm glass and contact the Security Guard Post / Management Office immediately; call 999 for Bomba and other rescue agencies.
  • Try to contain or extinguish the fire using available firefighting equipment, only if it doesn't endanger your life.
  • Do not use water if the fire is caused by an electrical fault.
  • If you can't control it, evacuate immediately after turning off the gas stove and cutting electricity. Do not collect belongings.
  • Do not use lifts — use the staircase.
  • Assist children, senior citizens, and people with disabilities during evacuation.
  • Report immediately to the Assembly Point; report any missing person right away.

Upon hearing the fire alarm: stop all activities, turn off gas and cut electricity, leave with all occupants, use the staircase only, assist those who need help, and report to the Assembly Point without obstructing rescue authorities. Do not return for valuables — smoke kills before fire.

AGM 1 — 24 Jun 2023

Diluluskan sebulat suara pada Mesyuarat Agung Pertama Perbadanan Pengurusan Kondominium Delima Emas.

  • Penyewaan kepada Warga Asing — Warga asing samada pekerja professional atau bukan professional, tidak dibenarkan menyewa di Kondominium Delima Emas. (Foreign nationals — whether professional workers or otherwise — are not permitted to rent units here.)
  • Had Penghuni — Unit yang disewa hendaklah tidak melebihi 6 orang sahaja. (Maximum 6 occupants per unit.)

AGM 2 — 20 Julai 2024

Diluluskan pada Mesyuarat Agung Ke Dua Perbadanan Pengurusan Kondominium Delima Emas.

  • Gymnasium — Denda RM100 atau 3 bulan tidak dibenarkan menggunakan bilik gym bagi pengguna yang tidak mematuhi peraturan gym (tertera di pintu masuk), vandalism dan sebagainya. (Fine RM100 or 3-month gym ban for violating gym rules, vandalism, etc.)
  • Parking Lot — Denda RM50 sekiranya kenderaan anda dikunci kerana meletak kenderaan di lot parking kepunyaan unit lain. (RM50 fine for parking in another unit's allocated lot.)
  • Parking Lot (Motosikal/Kereta) — Denda RM50 sekiranya kenderaan anda dikunci kerana meletakkan motosikal/kereta di tempat yang bukan di kawasan yang telah ditetapkan dan disediakan oleh pihak Pengurusan. (RM50 fine for parking motorcycle/car outside designated areas.)
  • Parking Visitor (Bermalam) — Kemudahan tempat kereta bagi pelawat bermalam hanya dibenarkan selama 3 hari sahaja. Bagi hari seterusnya akan dikenakan bayaran RM10 semalam. (Overnight visitor parking limited to 3 nights; RM10/night thereafter.)
  • Bilik Sampah — Denda RM100 bagi unit yang membuang sampah sesuka hati tanpa mematuhi notis yang ditampal pada bilik sampah. (RM100 fine for improper waste disposal ignoring posted notices.)
  • Lift — Denda RM100 bagi unit yang memberhentikan lift secara manual tanpa menggunakan kad akses, melakukan vandalism dengan sengaja. Sekiranya berlaku kerosakan lift, pengguna yang terlibat akan menanggung kos kerosakan tersebut. (RM100 fine for manually stopping lift without access card or vandalism; user bears repair costs if lift is damaged.)

AGM — 27 September 2025

Diluluskan sebulat suara pada Mesyuarat Agung MC 27 September 2025.

  • Invisible Grille di Balkoni — Dibenarkan, dengan spesifikasi: stainless steel cable Teflon-coated 2.0mm (SS316), jarak antara kabel 2.0 inci, dipasang penuh, lurus, di luar railing. (Balcony invisible grilles permitted — SS316 Teflon-coated cable 2.0mm, 2.0-inch gap, fully installed outside railing.)
  • Bidai Kayu (Bamboo Roller Blinds) — Dibenarkan, jenis kayu berwarna coklat gelap sahaja. (Bamboo roller blinds permitted — dark brown wood colour only.)

Etika Pembuangan Sampah: Tanggungjawab Kita Bersama

✅ Dibenarkan / Allowed

  • Sisa basah / bekas pembungkus makanan — pastikan sampah diikat dengan kemas sebelum dibuang ke dalam tong sampah. (Wet waste / food packaging — must be tied securely before disposal in the bin.)

❌ Tidak Dibenarkan / Not Allowed

  • (1) Kotak (boxes)
  • (2) Botol kaca / plastik (glass / plastic bottles)
  • (3) Tilam @ bantal (mattresses / pillows)
  • (4) Sisa e-waste (e-waste)
  • (5) Barang terpakai (used items)
  • (6) Perabot lama & rosak (old / broken furniture)

Kawasan Tempat Pembuangan

  • Kawasan pembuangan di bangunan parking kereta (ground floor) adalah untuk item (1) dan (2) sahaja — kotak dan botol kaca/plastik, diletakkan di kawasan kitar semula yang disediakan.
  • Item (3), (4), (5) dan (6) WAJIB dilupuskan sendiri di luar kawasan kondominium.

⚠️ Kegagalan mematuhi peraturan akan didenda minimum RM100.00 dan maksimum RM300.00.

Peraturan Penyewaan Tenancy Rules

⚠️ Pindaan AGM 24 Jun 2023: Warga asing samada pekerja professional atau bukan professional, tidak dibenarkan menyewa di Kondominium Delima Emas. (As of AGM Jun 2023, foreign nationals — professional or otherwise — are no longer permitted to rent units here.)

Had Penghuni / Occupancy Limit

  • Unit yang disewa hendaklah tidak melebihi 6 orang sahaja. (Maximum 6 occupants per rented unit.)

Pematuhan Undang-Undang Kecil Tambahan (AGM Sep 2025)

Berkuat kuasa serta merta dan wajib dipatuhi oleh semua pemilik unit.

  • 1) Pendaftaran penyewa — Pemilik wajib mendaftarkan penyewa warga asing profesional dengan Pejabat Pengurusan sebelum penyewa menduduki unit.
  • 2) Dokumen sokongan — Salinan pasport & visa yang sah, serta salinan kontrak perjanjian penyewaan, perlu dikemukakan kepada pengurusan.
  • 3) Tanggungjawab pemilik — Memastikan penyewa berkelakuan baik dan tidak menimbulkan gangguan di kondominium.
  • 4) Had maksimum penyewa — 6 orang bagi setiap unit.
  • 5) Tindakan penguatkuasaan — Pengurusan boleh mengenakan denda dan/atau melaporkan kepada pemilik atau agensi kerja sekiranya berlaku pelanggaran.
  • 6) Pengusiran penyewa — Penyewa yang gagal mematuhi Undang-Undang Kecil atau House Rules boleh diarahkan keluar oleh MC, selaras dengan Strata Management Act 2013.

This page summarises the Residents' House Rules & Regulations handbook and recent management circulars (AGM Jun 2023, Jul 2024, Sep 2025). For the full legal text, please refer to the official documents at the Management Office.

🏊 Facilities Booking Borang Tempahan Online

Sila masukkan nama anda. / Please enter your name.
Sila masukkan no. unit. / Please enter your unit number.
Sila pilih tarikh sah (hari ini atau akan datang). / Please choose a valid date (today or later).
Sila pilih masa. / Please choose a time.
Sila masukkan no. telefon yang sah. / Please enter a valid phone number.

🪪 Visitor Pass Registration Pendaftaran Pas Pelawat

Daftar pelawat anda sebelum mereka tiba. Pengawal keselamatan akan menyemak dan meluluskan pas di pintu masuk. / Register your visitor before they arrive. The security guard will verify and approve the pass at the gate.

Sila masukkan nama penghuni. / Please enter the resident's name.
Sila masukkan no. unit. / Please enter the unit number.
Sila masukkan nama pelawat. / Please enter the visitor's name.
Sila masukkan no. telefon yang sah. / Please enter a valid phone number.
Sila pilih tarikh sah (hari ini atau akan datang). / Please choose a valid date (today or later).
Sila pilih masa. / Please choose a time.

🛂 Security Login

⚠️ Content in this portal (announcements, bookings, visitor passes, etc.) is now stored in shared cloud storage, visible to everyone using this app. This login "password" only hides the panel from casual visitors — anyone who can view this page's source can see it. Do not use it to protect highly sensitive resident data.

Kemaskini nama dan muat naik gambar untuk setiap jawatan. Gambar disimpan dalam storan browser ini (max ~1MB setiap satu).

☁️ Cloud Setup Sambungan Storan Awan

Connect this portal to a free online JSON storage account so all data (announcements, bookings, visitor passes, etc.) is shared by everyone who opens this page — on any device, without them needing to set up anything.

⚠️ 3 steps are required for other residents to see your data — most people only do steps 1–2 and then wonder why their phone shows nothing. Step 3 (below) is what makes it actually shared.

Step 1 — Create a free account (2 minutes)

  1. Open jsonbin.io and sign up (Google/GitHub/email).
  2. Go to jsonbin.io/api-keys and copy your X-Master-Key.
  3. Paste it below and click "Connect" — the portal will automatically create a public storage bin for you (public means anyone with the Bin ID can read it — that's what lets residents view the portal with no setup; only this Master Key can change it).

Step 2 — Connect (this device only)

✅ Connected on this device. You can now save changes from here.

Bin visibility: checking…

Approx. data size: checking…

Required so other devices can read the portal without a key. Safe — only this Master Key can still change the data.

Step 3 — Make it shared (required, one-time)

Right now, only this browser knows the Bin ID. Other devices (residents' phones, your own phone) won't see any data until you bake the Bin ID into the page itself:

  1. Copy your Bin ID: —
  2. Send this Bin ID to whoever is helping you edit the portal file (e.g. paste it back here in this chat with Claude), and ask to have it set as the page's permanent shared Bin ID.
  3. Re-download the updated file and re-publish it to GitHub, like before.

After that one-time step, every visitor — including your own phone — will read the same shared data automatically, with no setup on their end.

⚠️ Your Master Key gives full read/write access to your JSONBin account — treat it like a password. It is stored only in this browser's local storage and only needed here in the Admin panel to make changes. Regular residents never need it, since reading the portal doesn't require any key.

📎 File Uploads Muat Naik Fail ke GitHub

Photos and documents attached to Announcements / Minutes / Forms are too large to store in JSONBin. Instead, connect your GitHub repository here — files will be uploaded directly into it, and only the resulting link (a few bytes of text) is saved in the cloud database.

Step 1 — Create a GitHub token (2 minutes)

  1. Open github.com/settings/tokens/new (Fine-grained token).
  2. Set Repository access to "Only select repositories" → choose your portal repo (e.g. JoePinkman99/delima-emas-portal).
  3. Under Permissions → Repository permissions, set Contents to Read and write.
  4. Generate the token and copy it (starts with github_pat_...).

Step 2 — Connect

✅ Saved on this device. New uploads will be sent to .

⚠️ This token can write files to your repository — treat it like a password. It is stored only in this browser's local storage and only used here in the Admin panel to upload files. Regular residents never need it — and since GitHub Pages requires this repository to be public, any file you upload here is viewable by anyone with the link, not just residents. Don't attach anything confidential (e.g. full IC numbers, bank statements).
Condominium Delima Emas Portal — data synced to shared cloud storage
Concept, Design & Content by Hafiz
